story.title: GAME 1, THE GARDEN, JUNE 3
story.text: Down double digits. Of course. Brunson hits the winner and 20,000 people forget every bad year at once. 1-0.

story.title: GAME 2, THE GARDEN, JUNE 5
story.text: Same script, same author. Another double-digit hole, another Brunson dagger. The Spurs start looking at each other. 2-0.

story.title: GAME 3, SAN ANTONIO, JUNE 8
story.text: The Spurs punch back at home and take one. Fine. Every great story needs a chapter where the hero's phone dies. 2-1.

story.title: GAME 4, SAN ANTONIO, JUNE 11
story.text: Down TWENTY-NINE. The comeback of comebacks. Alvarado chaos, Brunson's 9 in the 4th, and OG Anunoby's tip-in with 2.1 seconds left. 107-106. Mike Brown: maybe the biggest play in Knicks history. 3-1.

story.title: GAME 5, SAN ANTONIO, JUNE 13
story.text: Brunson: 45 points, 29 in the second half, ties MJ for most in a road clincher. 94-90. Mitch Robinson's 10 boards. The buzzer sounds and 53 years end in tears on Rick Brunson's shoulder. CHAMPIONS.

story.title: THE PARADE, CANYON OF HEROES
story.text: Lower Broadway disappears under blue and orange. The city that sold out the lottery years gets its receipt. Bing bong forever.

photo_hint: Drop your own 2026 championship photos (.jpg / .png) into assets/photos/ and they appear here automatically, newest last. Name them like 'game4_og_tipin.jpg', the filename becomes the caption.
